terms.definition: A mechanism in neural networks that selectively triggers parameter updates only when the model encounters a prediction error or high-loss scenario. By bypassing updates for data the model already understands, it minimizes the metabolic and computational cost of 'synaptic plasticity' during continual learning.
terms.analogy: Imagine a professional chef who only writes down a note when a dish fails; if the recipe works perfectly, they don't waste time or ink re-recording what they already know. It keeps the kitchen notebook lean and efficient.
terms.business_value: This significantly lowers the 'Hidden Cost of AI' by reducing the energy consumption and hardware wear-and-tear of edge devices that must learn on-the-job without constant, expensive cloud retraining.

terms.definition: The process of building transparent, human-interpretable 'proxy' models to mimic the outputs of massive, opaque 'black-box' simulations. These surrogates provide a computationally cheap way to predict outcomes while revealing the underlying logic of the complex system they represent.
terms.analogy: It is like having a simplified transparent 3D model of a car engine on your dashboard. Instead of just a 'Check Engine' light, you see exactly which gear is slipping, allowing you to trust the car's automated diagnostics.
terms.business_value: In high-stakes industries like nuclear power or finance, this provides 'Audit-Ready AI.' It allows executives to justify automated decisions to regulators, moving beyond 'the black box said so' to evidence-based governance.

terms.definition: An architectural shift for LLM agents that replaces rigid, prompt-response triggers with an internal rhythmic 'pulse' to manage cognitive tasks. This 'heartbeat' allows the AI to proactively schedule its own reflections, tool-use, and reasoning cycles rather than waiting for a human to tell it what to do next.
terms.analogy: Think of a car with an intelligent 'idle' mode. Instead of just sitting still at a red light, the car uses that 'heartbeat' interval to scan the horizon, optimize its route, and check its tire pressure proactively before you even touch the gas.
terms.business_value: This evolves AI from a reactive tool into a proactive digital employee. It increases operational velocity by allowing autonomous agents to manage complex, multi-day projects with significantly less human 'hand-holding' or prompting.
